blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,890 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: flurries, highs of 29°F, gusts to 41 mph.

Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
